hooks.command: cd /c/Users/user-laptop/projects/kiwilog && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'error TS' | head -20 || true

export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI"; CHANGED=$(cd /c/Users/user-laptop/projects/kiwilog && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | head -10); if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then FILES=$(echo "$CHANGED" | tr '
' ' '); gh issue create --repo doshincreator-ai/workholi-app --title "[Claude] 作業完了: $(date '+%m/%d %H:%M')" --body "## 変更ファイル
\`\`\`
${FILES}
\`\`\`" --label "claude-work" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
